response.justification: While the candidate is a highly experienced Staff/Senior Software Engineer with a strong background in web technologies, DLang, and Node.js, they do not meet the core requirements for this role. The position mandates 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows and deep Capital Markets or Fixed Income domain expertise. The candidate has less than a year of professional C++ experience from 2015 and lacks the necessary financial domain and enterprise SQL Server/Oracle background.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience (15+ years) with a strong focus on testing, CI/CD, and modern development practices.
Proven leadership capabilities, having held Staff and Senior roles and founded an open-source platform.
Some exposure to the investment sector through their work at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Falls significantly short of the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development experience, with only 7 months listed a decade ago.
Lacks the required domain expertise in Capital Markets, Fixed Income, or Investment Banking.
Does not demonstrate the mandatory strong SQL experience with SQL Server or Oracle, focusing more on NoSQL (MongoDB).
